name: Convergence-Latency-Aware Adaptive Modulation and Resource Allocation in RIS-Assisted Wireless Federated Learning

description: arXiv:2607.19759v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Federated learning (FL) over wireless networks suffers from significant training latency and degraded convergence due to unreliable wireless transmission, especially under blocked propagation environments. Although reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RISs) can improve communication reliability, existing wireless FL studies rarely characterize t...
author: Liwei Wang, Wen Chen, Jun Li, Qingqing Wu, Ming Ding, Xusheng Zhu, Qiong Wu
